name: White Washed Woven Rattan Bin Small - Brightroom™
description:
This Woven Rattan Small Bin from Brightroom™ is a versatile and attractive storage solution for any space. Woven from rattan in a washed white finish, this small bin is great for storing documents, folders, magazine and much more. Plus, side cutout handles make it easy to pick up and move as needed.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
